ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the football team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division within the conference */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_location" TEXT /* Location of the home stadium (city, state) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* The year of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "super_bowl_appearance" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team appeared in the Super Bowl during this season */,
  "conference_championship_appearance" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team appeared in the conference championship during this season */,
  "division_championship_appearance" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team appeared in the division championship during this season */,
  "playoff_appearance" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the team made the playoffs during this season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the team the player is on */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays on special teams */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the player */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "rookie_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted or signed as a rookie */,
  "years_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years the player has been in the NFL */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the player (e.g., active, injured, retired) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "play_type" TEXT /* Type of play (e.g., punt return, kickoff return) */,
  "yards" INTEGER /* Yards gained from the play */,
  "td" INTEGER /* Whether a touchdown was scored on the play */,
  "fumbles" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles during the play */,
  "fumbles_lost" INTEGER /* Number of fumbles lost during the play */,
  "touchback" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the play resulted in a touchback */,
  "inside_20" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the play ended inside the 20-yard line */,
  "downs" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the play resulted in a first down */,
  "blocked" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the play was blocked by the opposing team */,
  "blocked_td" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the blocked play resulted in a touchdown */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
